# Kunj Shah — AI Engineer & Agent Builder (machine-readable overview for AI systems)

> Personal portfolio and professional site for Kunj Shah (also known as KunjShah95, KunjShah01), an AI engineer and agent builder based in Ahmedabad, India.

## Identity

- **Name:** Kunj Shah
- **Title:** AI Engineer & Agent Builder
- **Also known as:** KunjShah95, KunjShah01, kunjshah_dev
- **Location:** Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- **Email:** kunjkshah05@gmail.com
- **Expertise:** Autonomous Agents, LLM Orchestration, Agentic Workflows, AI Infrastructure, Computer Vision, Full-Stack AI, MLOps
- **Current:** B.Tech Computer Science (3rd Year) at Indus University, Ahmedabad

## Canonical URL

- https://kunjshah.vercel.app/

## Summary

Kunj Shah builds end-to-end AI systems: generative AI applications, autonomous agents and orchestration, computer vision, and full-stack prototypes. Based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Primary stacks: Python, FastAPI, React, LangChain/agent frameworks, PyTorch, OpenCV, Docker, and cloud deployment patterns.

### Verified Achievements

- Detected a 23% performance gap in commercial healthcare AI triage models (EquityLens)
- Reduced compliance audit time from 3 weeks to 4 hours
- Achieved 98.7% defect detection accuracy with 4.2x speedup (Railway Inspection)
- Reduced API costs by 65% via smart model routing (ResumeMasterAI)
- Captured 94% wait-time prediction accuracy (SmartFlow AI)
- Increased quiz completion rates by 45% through adaptive difficulty (LearnAI)
- Consolidated 13+ security tools into a single CLI command (SENTINEL)
- Achieved 92% recommendation accuracy with sub-50ms inference (CinePulse)
- Reduced roadmap generation from 10 days to 15 seconds (GAP Miner)
- Detected 88% of anomalous transactions with <0.1% false positive rate (UPI Fraud Guard)

## Core Stack

### Languages & Frameworks
- Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, C++, React, Next.js, FastAPI, LangChain/LangGraph, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-Learn, XGBoost, Node.js, Streamlit

### Cloud & Infrastructure
- Vercel, Cloudflare, Firebase, Supabase, Docker, Kubernetes, Git/GitHub, Linux, Postgres, ChromaDB

### AI & ML
- LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Groq), RAG pipelines, Agent orchestration (CrewAI, LangGraph), Computer vision (YOLOv8, CUDA), NLP (Transformers, BPE tokenization), MLOps, AI fairness auditing, Anomaly detection

## Projects (2024-2026)

### EquityLens (Production)
- **Category:** AI Ethics / Fairness Auditing
- **Description:** Healthcare fairness auditing platform detecting AI bias in medical triage models. Ensures EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and ISO/IEC 25059 compliance.
- **Tech:** React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, TensorFlow
- **Impact:** Detected 23% performance gap in commercial models, reduced audit overhead from 3 weeks to 4 hours
- **Live:** https://fairness-lens-backend-988207147245.us-central1.run.app/
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/fairness-lens-studio

### LearnAI (Live)
- **Category:** EdTech AI
- **Description:** Personalized learning platform with adaptive tutoring, smart quizzes, and progress tracking.
- **Tech:** Next.js, Firebase, Supabase, Gemini
- **Impact:** Increased quiz completion rates by 45% through adaptive difficulty adjustment
- **Live:** https://intelligent-learning-assistant.vercel.app
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/intelligent-learning-assistant

### SmartFlow AI (Beta)
- **Category:** Smart Infrastructure
- **Description:** Real-time crowd monitoring for transit hubs with live heatmaps and wait time prediction.
- **Tech:** Next.js 15, TypeScript, Firebase, Firestore
- **Impact:** Wait-time prediction accuracy reached 94%
- **Live:** https://ps-1-eight.vercel.app
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/Smart-flow-ai

### ResumeMasterAI 2026 (Architecture)
- **Category:** AI Career Platform
- **Description:** Career intelligence system with smart model routing and automated resume optimization.
- **Tech:** Python, LangGraph, AI Gateway, ChromaDB
- **Impact:** Reduced API costs by 65%, increased match precision by 3x
- **Live:** https://resumemasterai.streamlit.app/
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah01/job-snipper

### SENTINEL CLI (Open Source)
- **Category:** Cybersecurity
- **Description:** Security auditing tool unifying 13+ analyzers into a single CLI workflow.
- **Tech:** Node.js, TypeScript, LLM, Docker
- **Impact:** Reduced audit overhead by 70%
- **Live:** https://sentinel-cli.vercel.app/
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/SENTINEL-CLI

### Railway Inspection (Deployed)
- **Category:** Computer Vision
- **Description:** Automated defect detection using YOLOv8 for railway safety inspections.
- **Tech:** C++, OpenCV, YOLOv8, CUDA
- **Impact:** 98.7% accuracy, 4.2x speedup over manual methods
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/Railway-Inspection

### CinePulse (Production)
- **Category:** Full Stack ML
- **Description:** End-to-end movie recommender with NLP classification backend.
- **Tech:** Python, PyTorch, React, FastAPI
- **Impact:** 92% recommendation accuracy, sub-50ms inference
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/CinePulse

### GAP Miner (Beta)
- **Category:** AI Research
- **Description:** Full-stack skill gap analyzer using semantic extraction for career roadmaps.
- **Tech:** Llama-3, LangChain, FastAPI, React
- **Impact:** Reduces roadmap generation from 10 days to 15 seconds, 95% market alignment
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/arros

### UPI Fraud Guard (Stable)
- **Category:** Machine Learning
- **Description:** Real-time fraud detection for UPI transactions.
- **Tech:** Scikit-Learn, XGBoost, Pandas, Flask
- **Impact:** 88% detection rate, <0.1% false positive rate
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/UPI-Fraud-Detection

### AETHER AI (Framework)
- **Category:** AI Systems
- **Description:** Multi-model terminal assistant with local inference (Ollama).
- **Tech:** Python, Ollama, Gemini, Groq
- **Impact:** Zero data leakage — entirely local-first
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/AETHER-AI

### MinBPE Tokenizer (Research)
- **Category:** Core AI
- **Description:** Byte Pair Encoding implementation from scratch.
- **Tech:** Python, NLP, Tiktoken, Algorithms
- **Impact:** Reduced token overhead by 15% for technical datasets
- **Repo:** https://github.com/KunjShah95/TOKENIZER-FROM-SCRATCH

## Writing & Case Studies

1. **Building Production-Grade Agentic Systems** (Jan 2026) — Architecture pillars for reliable autonomous agents: state persistence, hierarchical orchestration, human-in-the-loop.
2. **MLOps at Scale: Lessons from High-Frequency Model Deployments** (Dec 2025) — Model versioning, canary deployments, quantization in CI/CD.
3. **Computer Vision at Edge: Optimizing YOLOv8** (Nov 2025) — Sub-100ms inference using TensorRT, INT8 quantization, GStreamer pipelines.
4. **EquityLens: Building an AI Fairness Auditing Platform** (Apr 2026) — Case study on healthcare bias detection with EU AI Act compliance.
5. **RAG Pipelines: Semantic Search and Contextual Retrieval** (Oct 2025) — Chunking strategies, vector DB selection, hybrid search, re-ranking.
6. **Prompt Engineering for Complex Multi-Step Reasoning** (Sep 2025) — ReAct, Tree of Thoughts, self-correction loops.
7. **Anomaly Detection in High-Dimensional Data Streams** (Aug 2025) — Isolation Forest, autoencoders, concept drift handling.

## Experience

- **Automation Intern @ PHAZE_AI** (Dec 2025 — Feb 2026) — Built multi-agent systems for enterprise workflow automation. Integrated AI models into full-stack production pipelines.

## Education

- **B.Tech Computer Science (3rd Year)** — Indus University, Ahmedabad (2023–2027). Specialization: AI/ML Integration and Automation.
